Class Topic

java.lang.Object
graph.Topic
public class Topic extends Object
A named pub-sub channel in the computational graph.

Agents subscribe to a topic to receive messages via Agent.callback(java.lang.String, graph.Message), and register as publishers when they produce output on that topic. Calling publish(graph.Message) stores the message as the last value and synchronously notifies all subscribers.

Instances are created exclusively through TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager.getTopic(java.lang.String); the constructor is package-private.

Thread safety: lastMessage is stored in a volatile field. The subs and pubs lists are not synchronized; concurrent subscribe/unsubscribe operations alongside publish(graph.Message) may race unless external coordination is applied.

See Also:
  • TopicManagerSingleton
  • Agent
  • Message

  • Field Details

    • name

      public final String name
      The unique name of this topic.

  • Method Details

    • getLastMessage

      public Message getLastMessage()
      Returns the most recently published message on this topic.
      Returns:
      the last Message, or null if none has been published yet

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(Agent a)
      Registers an agent to receive messages published on this topic.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent to subscribe

    • unsubscribe

      public void unsubscribe(Agent a)
      Removes an agent from this topic's subscriber list.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent to unsubscribe

    • publish

      public void publish(Message m)
      Publishes a message to this topic and notifies all subscribers.

      Updates getLastMessage() and invokes Agent.callback(java.lang.String, graph.Message) on each subscriber synchronously in the calling thread.

      Parameters:
      m - the message to publish

    • addPublisher

      public void addPublisher(Agent a)
      Registers an agent as a publisher on this topic.

      Used for graph visualization to record data-flow direction; does not affect message delivery.

      Parameters:
      a - the agent to register as a publisher

    • removePublisher

      public void removePublisher(Agent a)
      Removes an agent from this topic's publisher list.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent to remove

    • getPubs

      public List<Agent> getPubs()
      Returns a defensive copy of the publisher list.
      Returns:
      a new List containing all registered publishers

    • getSubs

      public List<Agent> getSubs()
      Returns a defensive copy of the subscriber list.
      Returns:
      a new List containing all subscribers
